content.text:
Professionally, a lot. I mean, I'm good at my job — I know I'm good at my job — but the moment my boss walks into a room, something just... collapses. I can't think clearly, I can't speak up, I second-guess everything I was about to say. And then afterwards I'm furious at myself, which costs me too.

And I think it's costing me something harder to name. Like... a version of myself I can't access when it matters. That's the part that bothers me more, honestly.
